creator: mph@pobox.com
text:
After I upgraded the angband port to 2.8.2, the author of the game
posted an article to news describing changes to the game; one important
change is that if you use the "X11" interface instead of "XAW", the
game now allows you to limit the number of windows it opens at
startup.  I have modified the port to use "X11" instead of "XAW" so
that this feature is available.

I also included the changes listing as files/CHANGES-2.8.2, and changed
Makefile and pkg/DESCR to note the presence of the file.

Fix: "patch -p1" in the port directory.
